top_signals.title: Zelenskyy taps European allies to build Freya, a cheaper Patriot-alternative to Russia’s ballistic missiles
top_signals.summary: Ukraine will hold its first coalition meeting on a homegrown ballistic missile defense system in France “in the coming days.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Christopher Harborne suffered serious medical issues while donating £12mn to Reform UK
top_signals.summary: Thailand-based crypto billionaire paused US lawsuit for nearly a year until January 2026
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Police ‘pursuing enquiries’ in Widdecombe murder case after releasing arrested man
top_signals.summary: Devon and Cornwall force said 26-year-old was no longer part of the investigation and issued appeal for help
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ryuk ransomware member pleads guilty in the US, faces 15 years in prison
top_signals.summary: A 34-year-old Armenian man has pleaded guilty to hacking U.S. companies and deploying the infamous Ryuk ransomware to encrypt their systems. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sadiq Khan lobbies for Ed Miliband to become chancellor
top_signals.summary: Energy secretary wins support from London mayor but faces opposition from some Labour MPs over his net zero policies

top_signals.title: Japan successfully launches and lands reusable rocket
top_signals.summary: The prototype, launched from JAXA's test site in Noshiro, Akita Prefecture, reached a height of about 10 meters, and then landed.
